message:
feat(Python): Implement 5 configuration CPython Python/ modules

Add full implementations:
- _warnings.zig: Warnings subsystem with categories/filters/registry
- preconfig.zig: Pre-initialization configuration (locale, UTF-8 mode)
- initconfig.zig: Full Python configuration (PyConfig, args parsing)
- pathconfig.zig: Path configuration (sys.path, venv support)
- interpconfig.zig: Sub-interpreter configuration (GIL modes, PEP 684)

Total: ~2520 lines of idiomatic Zig with comprehensive tests.
